reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a GitHub username lookup request, granted GitHub account access, and received a response with the GitHub username "yiw190".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents including "QA-20260319-191210-lo6g" with "idle" status.
Clicked on "QA-20260319-191210-lo6g" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent detail page showing the landing page with message input field.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle", which meets the requirement.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was successfully typed and sent, agent status changed to "working".
Observed account access request card appearing — After the agent processed the request and determined no GitHub account was connected, a card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access.
Selected GitHub account and granted access — Clicked the GitHub checkbox to select it, then clicked the "Grant Access (1)" button to grant the agent permission to use the connected GitHub account.
Waited for agent to complete response — Agent processed the request and returned to "idle" status after 38 seconds.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190. You have a GitHub Pro plan, 3 public repos, and 12 private repos."
Took screenshot of final result — Full page screenshot captured showing complete conversation history with the GitHub username response.
